description.value:
Prerequisite: Not a Spellcaster Hero, Level 2+

You have become an apprentice Spellcaster, learning the arts of Channeling.

  • You gain the Arcana skill proficiency.

  • You gain the Channeling Talent from the Spellcaster Archetype, but your Maximum Mana is half (rounded up) of what is listed for your Hero Level.

  • You gain the Spellcasting Talent from the Spellcaster Archetype, but your Spell Rank is one less than what is listed for your Hero Level.

  • You learn two spells of your choice from the Essentials School and one additional Rank 0 spell of your choice. You do not need to prepare these spells to cast them.
